vendor_context: Priority Bicycles competitor (eBike / value commuter segment)
status: ACTIVE — High-growth DTC eBike brand; US market dominant; Canada now live (English + French storefronts)

networks.name: Impact
networks.notes: Primary US network. Commission rate upgraded from 3% flat to 4–6% range, per third-party aggregator data updated ~April 8–10, 2026. Application via lectricebikes.com (affiliate page 404'd — may have been restructured). Content publishers, cycling sites, review channels eligible.

networks.name: Refersion
networks.status: NEWLY DETECTED — second network (possible CA / influencer tier)
networks.notes: Refersion newly cited alongside Impact in third-party aggregator data (magentheme.com, ~April 8, 2026). Not previously confirmed. Likely serves as influencer/creator tier or Canadian market affiliate delivery — aligns with April 2 Canada launch. Verify directly before promoting.

affiliate_program.commission_summary: 4–6% on qualifying sales (Impact + Refersion); upgraded from 3% flat as of ~April 2026
affiliate_program.affiliate_page_status: 404 — lectricebikes.com/pages/affiliate returns 404; may be restructured or moved. Verify via Impact or Refersion directly.

earth_day_sale.notes: Earth Day sale running through late April 2026. High-conversion window for affiliates. Lectric promoted this heavily via Electrek, 9to5Toys, and owned channels.

company_status.financial: STABLE — Private, Arizona-based; no distress signals; strong Earth Day promotional activity signals healthy inventory/margin
company_status.positioning: Value-leader in US eBike market; high-volume, affordable folding and commuter eBikes

expansion.canada_storefront: LIVE — lectricebikes.com now shows CA (English) and CA (Français) storefronts as of April 2026
expansion.canada_affiliate_status: UNCONFIRMED on Impact — Refersion addition may serve as CA affiliate delivery mechanism. Watch for CA-specific Impact program launch.
expansion.notes: Canada market entry announced April 2, 2026. Partnership centered on infrastructure advocacy. First international expansion. US/CA affiliate program structure still being confirmed.

competitive_intel.commission_vs_category: Lectric now 4–6% (upgraded) — matches Aventon low end (5–10%) and exceeds Rad's baseline (3–7%). No longer the low-rate outlier in eBike affiliate space.
competitive_intel.commission_trajectory: INCREASING — 3% → 4–6% range is a ~33–100% rate improvement. Signals aggressive affiliate recruitment push as Canada expansion requires new geo-targeted publisher relationships.
competitive_intel.affiliate_risk: LOW-MEDIUM — Program is expanding but affiliate page 404'd (sign of restructuring, not closure). Refersion addition adds complexity but broadens reach.
competitive_intel.canada_affiliate_opportunity: DEVELOPING — Refersion addition + live CA storefront = likely imminent CA affiliate program launch. Monitor weekly.
competitive_intel.earth_day_conversion_window: ACTIVE — Up to $694 in savings through late April creates a high-EPC environment for any affiliates currently in the program.
competitive_intel.opportunity_for_priority: Priority Bicycles competes for same cycling content affiliates. Lectric's rate upgrade closes the gap with Premium programs. Priority must differentiate on story (zero-maintenance, no battery anxiety, lifestyle premium) and build direct relationships with cycling YouTubers/reviewers before Lectric's expanded program locks them in.

changes: Commission rate upgraded: 3% flat → 4–6% range (per third-party aggregator data ~April 8–10, 2026). MATERIAL CHANGE.
New network detected: Refersion added alongside Impact. Previously Impact-only. MATERIAL CHANGE.
Canada storefront confirmed live: lectricebikes.com now shows CA (English) + CA (Français). Previously 'announced but unknown status'.
Earth Day sale running: up to $694 savings on select models from $799.

history.event: First audit. Confirmed Impact as primary network, 3% commission, 30-day cookie, ~$928 AOV, ~$0.97 EPC. Notable: Canada expansion announced April 2, 2026 via Vélo Canada Bikes partnership. 650k+ units sold in 6 years. Canadian affiliate program not yet confirmed.

CHANGES DETECTED. Commission rate upgraded from 3% to 4–6% range. Refersion added as second network alongside Impact. Canada storefront now live (CA English + French). Affiliate page 404'd (likely restructured). Earth Day sale active (up to $694 savings). Discord alert sent.
